summary: Processed 1 pending curmudgeon review (WIN-020.c5.json, 1 moderate + 4 minor holes). All 5 patches self-applied successfully. 3692/0 tests pass. Triaged ISS-2191 (CHIME-FRB HTTP 500) via BAU wontfix. Queue depth: 1 (WIN-020 verification). 0 open issues remaining.

integrity.summary: Site healthy. 3692/0 tests. Build output matches source. No untracked findings.

unresolved_prior_cycle.note: ISS-1196 was closed as decider-verify-already-done on 2026-04-20 but the Saros/nodal conflation was never actually patched. Successor ISS-2195 created and fixed this run.

patches_applied.description: detail_evidence: Fixed Saros/nodal conflation. Antikythera encodes Saros (~18.03 yr), not the 18.613-yr nodal regression. Added Clairaut 1749 attribution. Also fixed LLR phrasing (hole 3 combined). Successor to ISS-1196 (incorrectly closed 2026-04-20).
detail_verdict_text: Softened "at any precision at all" → "at any precision" to remove rhetorical strawman.
detail_verdict_text: Removed <strong> wrapper from second adjacent bold sentence to eliminate double-strong redundancy.
detail_evidence: LLR phrasing fix ("millimeter precision" → "millimeter-range precision"). Fixed in same patch as ISS-2195 (hole 0 combined).
detail_verdict_text: Replaced two curly apostrophes (U+2019) with straight ASCII apostrophes to match surrounding prose style.

bau_triage.details: ISS-2191 (CHIME-FRB HTTP 500, minor, ~13h): wontfixed — transient external resource error, not our site content; integrity will recheck.

m1_sweep.note: No items over 21d threshold (BAU mode). 0 open issues remaining post-BAU-triage.

curmudgeon_queue.action_taken: pushed WIN-020 verification (queue_id 403, class=verification) after self-applying 5 patches

open_issues_state.note: All 5 WIN-020 patch ISS created and immediately closed as fixed. ISS-2191 wontfixed. 0 open remaining.

self_test.note: All status=open items with age>=12h triaged (ISS-2191 wontfixed). New ISS-2195..2199 created+closed same run (ineligible for BAU age gate). No carry-over needed.

recommended_actions.action: Curmudgeon: review WIN-020 (queue_id 403, class=verification) — verify 5 self-applied patches landed cleanly and check for new holes introduced by the Saros/nodal clarification.

ISS-1196 tracking note: that ISS was incorrectly closed as "decider-verify-already-done" on 2026-04-20 without the fix being applied. ISS-2195 is the successor and has now been fixed. The pattern (close-without-verify) should be flagged in the tinker pipeline-health check.
